summary: Markets are showing bullish momentum with Bitcoin surging amid dollar weakness and positive ETF inflows, while forex pairs like EUR/USD break higher on rate cut expectations. Commodities such as gold benefit from the weakening USD, though some crypto analysts note short-term correction risks after recent highs. Overall sentiment leans positive driven by macro easing and institutional accumulation.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin gearing up for pullback to $65,500 liquidity trap zone to load up before rallying higher while retail panics.

signals.name: Altcoins
signals.reason: Altcoins positioned to rally next following Bitcoin's rally.

signals.name: EUR/USD
signals.reason: Breaks above 1.20+ as dollar crashes across the board due to weak 50K NFP print signaling September rate cut.

signals.name: USD/JPY
signals.reason: Falls to 149-151 range amid broad dollar weakness from disappointing NFP data.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Benefits from dollar crash and sticky inflation in a macro easing environment.
